title: Fix flaky test mutation_span_includes_realtime_context missing store_id

acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] `cargo xtest` is the documented, trusted fast-path runner for this repo
- [ ] CI uses the same nextest-backed defaults where appropriate
- [ ] The fast tier is measured at 60 seconds or less on a warm build before the bead closes
- [ ] The slow tier is measured at 120 seconds or less on a warm build before the bead closes
description:
**Problem**
There is no single canonical fast-path test runner. `cargo xtest` is missing in this workspace, `nextest` has no repo configuration yet, and CI still pays for inefficient defaults.

**Design**
Define one canonical runner path for local and CI use: add repo `nextest` configuration, wire or install the `cargo xtest` entrypoint, and make the default fast tier explicitly target <=60 seconds on a warm build. Slow tests should use the same harness conventions with clear opt-in.

**Files**
- `.config/nextest.toml`
- `Cargo.toml` / workspace tooling config
- `justfile`
- `.github/workflows/**`
- `docs/` for local test workflow guidance

notes.author: darin@book
notes.content:
The canonical runner path is now proven on the current stack even though this bead stays open behind remaining deps.

Current receipts:
- `cargo xtest --no-fail-fast --status-level none --final-status-level slow` -> `42.182s`
- `cargo nextest run --profile slow --workspace --all-features --features slow-tests --no-fail-fast --status-level none --final-status-level slow` -> `42.532s`
- repeated burn-in artifact: `tmp/perf/burnin-20260314-121518`
- current profiling artifact: `tmp/perf/tests-20260314-122418`

The remaining blockers are the still-open harness/isolation beads, not the runner timing target itself.

notes.author: darin@book
notes.content:
Current runner receipts from /Users/darin/src/personal/beads-rs after the port-race/env-hardening work:

- `.config/nextest.toml` now fences the tailnet fault-injection cluster into `tailnet-fault-injection` while keeping the shared fast runner at `test-threads = 4`
- `env BD_CONFIG_DIR=/tmp/codex-ambient-config BD_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/codex-ambient-runtime XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/codex-ambient-xdg GIT_DIR=/tmp/codex-ambient-git-dir GIT_WORK_TREE=/tmp/codex-ambient-git-worktree cargo xtest --no-fail-fast --status-level none --final-status-level slow` -> `42.099s`
- `env BD_CONFIG_DIR=/tmp/codex-ambient-config BD_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/codex-ambient-runtime XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/codex-ambient-xdg GIT_DIR=/tmp/codex-ambient-git-dir GIT_WORK_TREE=/tmp/codex-ambient-git-worktree cargo nextest run --profile slow --workspace --all-features --features slow-tests --no-fail-fast --status-level none --final-status-level slow` -> `41.689s`

This bead still stays open behind the remaining runner/docs/CI-alignment work and its explicit open deps.

title: Land a canonical cargo xtest plus nextest config for local and CI runs
